title: trigonella corniculata
intro: Trigonella corniculata, also known as Indian viper's grass, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as having potential effects on blood sugar levels and cardiovascular health. Trigonella corniculata can be prepared as herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
